name: sinfleet-erp-saas
description: SinFleet ERP - multi-tenant fleet management ERP SaaS platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
